title: lathyrus laevigatus
intro: Lathyrus laevigatus, also known as the smooth pea or hairy vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The smooth pea is believed to have several health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential neurotoxic effects.
